zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Trask Randell Sr.於1523年出生在英國貝德福爾比格萊斯瓦德 崔德時，他的父親John Randall Randolph18歲，母親Johanna Richmond15歲。他於1544年6月6日與Margaret Redman在英國英格蘭貝德福爾素爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1563年6月17日在英國薩默塞特巴斯巴斯 艾比享年40歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特巴斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Trask Randell Sr.于1523年出生在英国貝德福爾比格萊斯瓦德 崔德时，他的父亲John Randall Randolph18岁，母亲Johanna Richmond15岁。他于1544年6月6日与Margaret Redman在英国英格兰貝德福爾素爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1563年6月17日在英国薩默塞特巴斯巴斯 艾比享年40岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特巴斯。

nameMeanings.name: Randell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Randall
meanings: English (of Norman origin): common colloquial pronunciation of   Randolph  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Trask
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Somerset): variant of Thirsk, a habitational name for someone from Thirsk in Yorkshire, named from an unattested Old Norse word, thresk ‘marsh’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Trask Randell Sr. was born in 1523, in Biggleswade Hundred, Bedfordshire, England, his father, John Randall Randolph, was 18 and his mother, Johanna Richmond, was 15. He married Margaret Redman on 6 June 1544, in Southill, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 17 June 1563, in Bath Abbey, Bath, Somerset, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in Bath, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Trask Randell Sr. est né en 1523, à Biggleswade Hundred, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Randall Randolph, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Johanna Richmond, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Redman le 6 juin 1544, à Southill, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 17 juin 1563, à Bath Abbey, Bath, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Bath, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Trask Randell Sr. 1523 in Biggleswade Hundred, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Randall Randolph 18 und seine Mutter Johanna Richmond 15. Er hat am 6. Juni 1544 in Southill, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Redman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 17. Juni 1563 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Bath Abbey, Bath, Somerset, England und wurde in Bath, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Trask Randell Sr. è nato il nel 1523 nel Biggleswade Hundred, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, John Randall Randolph, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Richmond, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Redman il 6 giugno 1544, nel Southill, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 17 giugno 1563, nel Bath Abbey, Bath, Somerset, England, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Bath, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Trask Randell Sr.が1523年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアビググレスワド ハンドレドで生まれた時，父John Randall Randolphは18歳，母Johanna Richmondは15歳であった。1544年6月6日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアソウスイルでMargaret Redmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1563年6月17日にイギリスソメルセトバスバス アビーで40歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトバスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Trask Randell Sr.(이)가 1523년 영국 베드퍼드실르 비글레스웨이드 헌드레드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Randall Randolph(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Richmond(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1544년 6월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 소우스이에서 Margaret Redman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1563년 6월 17일 영국 서머세트 바스 바스 애브브이에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 바스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Trask Randell Sr. nasceu em 1523, em Biggleswade Hundred, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Randall Randolph, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Richmond, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Redman em 6 de junho de 1544, em Southill, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 17 de junho de 1563, em Bath Abbey, Bath, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Bath, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Trask Randell Sr. родился в 1523 г. в местности биглесвад хундред, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Randall Randolph было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Richmond, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Redman 6 июня 1544 г. в местности соутилл, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 17 июня 1563 г. в местности бат эбби, бат, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности бат, сомирсет, Англия.

Se casó con Margaret Redman el 6 de junio de 1544, en Southill, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 17 de junio de 1563, en Bath Abbey, Bath, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Bath, Somerset, Inglaterra.
